sp_widget.name: Tasker Count
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"displayValue":"Images","hint":"Select an Image to use instead of glyph","name":"icon","section":"Presentation","label":"Icon","type":"reference","value":"db_image","ed":{"reference":"db_image"}},{"hint":"Select this to add an ellipses and make this filter dynamic","name":"is_dynamic_filter","section":"Behavior","default_value":"false","label":"Is Dynamic Filter","type":"boolean"},{"displayValue":"Modern Portal View","hint":"Select the Filter to show when this control is on the My Task page","name":"tasker_filter_my_task_filter","section":"Data","label":"Tasker Filter - My Task Filter","type":"reference","value":"x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters","ed":{"reference":"x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters"}},{"displayValue":"Modern Portal View","hint":"Select the Filter to show when this control is on the My OU Task page","name":"tasker_filter_my_ou_s_task_filter","section":"Data","label":"Tasker Filter - My OU's Task Filter","type":"reference","value":"x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters","ed":{"reference":"x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters"}}]
